Sales tax and country-specific VAT, if applicable, and a reasonable shipping and handling fee will be added (if
Customer is not paying the shipping fee directly to the carrier and to the extent not already quoted above) to
Customer's Invoice. Customer’s receipt and purchase, and NanoString’s sale, of the products and services quoted
herein are subject to the applicable terms and conditions available at https://www.nanostring.com/legal/terms-sale
(the “Terms”). By placing an order for the products or services identified in this quotation, Customer accepts and
agrees to be bound by the Terms applicable to such products or services, which Terms are hereby incorporated
by reference. We impose a 2% surcharge on all credit card transactions, which is not greater than our cost of
acceptance. Debit cards are not surcharged.
